projects.title: Autonomous Sensor Platform
projects.summary: A sample hardware and software project entry for an embedded sensing system with firmware, enclosure notes, and test documentation.
highlights: Designed firmware flow for sensor sampling, local processing, and serial data output.
Documented wiring, board bring-up, and validation steps for reviewers.
Packaged diagrams and test notes so the build can be evaluated quickly.

projects.title: Project Documentation Hub
projects.summary: A sample software project entry for a web app that organizes source code, documents, diagrams, and project metadata.
highlights: Built a searchable project library for fast recruiter review.
Separated project data from presentation so new work can be added without redesigning the page.
Prepared the site for static hosting with no build tooling required.

projects.title: Control System Bench Test
projects.summary: A sample hardware project entry for a bench-tested control system with schematics, measurements, and lessons learned.
highlights: Captured design assumptions, test setup, and measurement results.
Linked diagrams and supporting documents for technical inspection.
Recorded failure modes and next iteration priorities.
